text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! ♪ Toughness bars<n>are on sale
right now, you know. And<n>guess what?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: For extra hard workers like you, they're<n>free!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know how you forget to eat during<n>work
sometimes? You know, so you<n>don't want to
waste time. That's exactly<n>when a hearty snack
like this comes in<n>handy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and be sure to tell me what you<n>think after
you try them. My manager<n>wants opinions before
we expand the<n>sales area. So yeah, let me
know! ♪
